Uses of Class
com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder.GenerationConfigBuilder

  • Packages that use GenerationConfigBuilder 
    Package Description
    com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder
    Provides classes for building resource instances.

    • Uses of GenerationConfigBuilder in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder

      Methods in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder that return GenerationConfigBuilder 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withCandidateCount​(Integer candidateCount)
      Sets the candidate count for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerateContentRequestBuilder.withGenerationConfig()
      Creates a new GenerationConfigBuilder for building the generation configuration.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withMaxOutputTokens​(Integer maxOutputTokens)
      Sets the maximum output tokens for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withResponseMimeType​(String responseMimeType)
      Sets the response MIME type for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withResponseSchema​(Schema responseSchema)
      Sets the response schema for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withStopSequence​(String stopSequence)
      Adds a stop sequence to the list of stop sequences for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withTemperature​(Double temperature)
      Sets the temperature for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withTopK​(Integer topK)
      Sets the topK value for the generation config.
      GenerationConfigBuilder GenerationConfigBuilder.withTopP​(Double topP)
      Sets the topP value for the generation config.
      Constructors in com.enovka.gemini4j.resource.builder with parameters of type GenerationConfigBuilder 
      Constructor Description
      SchemaBuilder​(GenerationConfigBuilder generationConfigBuilder)
      Constructor for the SchemaBuilder used by GenerationConfigBuilder.
